title: The Seraphim Turn the Battlefield
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Law, Luffy, Lucci, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who would disable it and for what purpose?!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Is someone in the control room?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: No! Our detectors aren't picking up anyone!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If those deterrents are really down, this is a golden chance, Lucci!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wait. It might be a trap!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Doesn't this malfunction sound a little too convenient?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: See! We've gotten this far and it's fine, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: for this to happen with your life at stake...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The heavens have abandoned you, vegapunk.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Wow! There's a robot here too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've already taken care of all the ships down below...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Now we've just gotta destroy this one.

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
